name: Rufus Barma
description: The last of the four dukes. Rufus is known as the longest living duke (at 67 years old) and is a very knowledgeable person. He holds information on almost all topics and even knows people's personalities and is thus able to predict their reactions. He absolutely detests people changing without him knowing as then he would not have the most updated information. Oz and co. approach Rufus to seek information about the Tragedy of Sabrié. name: Senri Shiki
description: Senri Shiki is one of the youngest Night Class members and works as a model with Rima Touya. He stands at 178 cm tall. Senri is usually the one sent out to hunt down a level E vampire. He is able to control and bend his blood at will. Senri's father is Rido Kuran, making him Kaname and Yuki's cousin, and his mother's uncle is part of the council. name: Sheena Totsuki
description: Because of her class number, she is in the same room with Mimi and is partnered with her. She hates war and anyone getting hurt, and has doubts about her mission as a weapon. Her magical power is low, and she can only use magic to move a book by floating it in the air...

She is a genius scientist, given a position equal to the representative of ATLAS at an extremely young age. This event gave her the name of Atlasia, allowed to be used only by those who were the head of the Atlas. She is presently being chased both by the Church organization and Mage's Association. name: Tsuruya
description: Tsuruya is the hyperactive friend of [Mikuru](https://anilist.co/character/253/Mikuru-Asahina), notable for her loud voice, ankle-length hair, and prominent tooth. She possesses a cheerful and friendly disposition. She is also prone to long fits of unrestrained and intense laughter at things she considers even the slightest bit humorous. Her fang-like tooth gives her an idiosyncratic speech pattern, causing her to misspeak words by leaving out syllables. Her speech pattern is often accompanied w

name: Yachiyo Todoroki
description: Yachiyo is another employee at the restaurant. She usually carries around a katana which, according to her, was made by her parents who used to be blacksmiths. Yachiyo is unaware that some of the customers, and even Souta, are intimidated by her blade. She admires Kyouko considerably. She gets angry if anyone offers Kyouko food or tries to take her away, although is willing to allow Satou to feed her because she considers him trustworthy, much to his chagrin.

name: Yayaka
description: Cocona's childhood friend and classmate. Cocona relies on her for her cool and strong-minded personality. She cares for Cocona deeply, getting jealous when she gets a new friend. ~!Yayaka secretly works with FlipFlap's rival organization, Asclepius, to collect amorphous fragments. She is partners with Toto and Yuyu.!~

name: Yui Ichii
description: Yui Ichii is a member of the Data Processing Club. Yui is generally shy, and she is often the target of Yuzuko and Yukari's antics since they like to tease her.

name: Yuki Kusakabe
description: A timid snow woman whose body is always cold. She will sometimes spread cold air while experiencing negative emotions and is susceptible to heat. She initially dislikes her demi nature, fearing that she could harm others, though Tetsuo manages to show her that the only things she can actually freeze are her tears and sweat. She's also secretly a manga enthusiast and has a taste for multiple genres. (Source: Wikipedia)
mediaTitles: Interviews with Monster Girls: The Demi-chans' Summer Break
searchTerms: Interviews with Monster Girls: The Demi-chans' Summer Break

name: Yuri Elizabeth
description: Yuri Elizabeth is the protagonist of the novel “The Brats I Love” . She was adopted into the Elizabeth family because of her magical ability. ~!She is forced to live through the novel's plot again and again.!~

name: Annette
description: A priest at the Airsten Cathedral where Sensei was transferred. A pure-hearted person who devotes herself to others.

name: Cecilia
description: A priestess who is part of the Hero's party. She is kind and beautiful, but scolds Youki when his actions get too much. While shocked by Youki's affection for her, Cecilia decided to build up a relationship first. Though the hero and other boys hit on her, Cecilia stays true to Youki.

name: Giroro
description: Corporal of the Keroro Platoon. Giroro's history in war left him with a scar and weapon belt in memory of his killed friends. Giroro loves Natsumi Hinata and he would attack anyone who harms her. His weapon expertise and power makes him a powerful member of the platoon. His often aggravated and irritably short tempered self is caused by the lackadaisical and unfocused members of the Platoon, especially Keroro, in their invasion of Pekopon. Giroro is often used as comic relief throughout the seri

name: Gonta Gokuhara
description: Ten years ago, a young Gonta got lost in the woods while searching for insects. It took ten years for him to be returned safely to his family, but in that time he was raised by a family of kind wolves, and he learned to speak with animals and insects, earning him a SHSL title. For the sake of his woodland family, Gonta aims to be a true gentleman. He is normally gentle and genteel, but when the topic of insects comes up, he can suddenly change. (Source: VNDB)

name: Izuminokami Kanesada
description: Made by Kanesada, who was active from the end of the Edo period, and is said to have been a favorite of Shinsengumi vice-commander Hijikata Toshizo. He lives by the themes of both beauty and power. His short temper is the fault of his former owner.

name: Lilith
description: **Lilith** is [Yuuko](https://anilist.co/character/141461)'s demon ancestor. She appears in her dreams one night and gives her demon powers, and tasks her on defeating a magical girl.
